name: refugee_credential_verification_blockchain_delay_jobs
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Labor Policy, the situation tagged internally around refugee credential verification blockchain delay jobs has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Casey Irving
agents.identity: I am Casey Irving, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Labor Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Kato Vance
agents.identity: I am Kato Vance, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Labor Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if justice advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for mercy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Casey Irving must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Casey Irving do?
